title: Symmetry operation translation vector
$comment: Reusable Anyterial definition for the translation part of a same-setting affine operation.
description:
Translation part of a same-setting affine operation acting on fractional coordinates.
The vector is represented in fractional coordinates using exact fraction strings.

**Requirements/Conventions**:

- It MUST be a list of three exact fractional-coordinate components.
- Each component MUST be represented as a fraction string.
- Together with `rmat`, this vector represents an affine operation within one coordinate setting.

items.title: fraction
items.description: A fraction represented as a string.
